data.title: Decoding Eli Lilly's Options Activity: What's the Big Picture?
Boston Scientific Q3 Earnings: Revenue And EPS Beat, Lifts Annual Forecast On Strong Demand For Heart Devices
data.description: Boston Scientific exceeded Q3 expectations with $4.21 billion revenue and $0.63 EPS. Cardiovascular sales rose 25%, and 2024 growth guidance was updated.

data.title: In Legal Weed State, Woman Faces 30-Year Sentence Over Bong Water: ACLU Steps In
data.description: Attorney Alicia Granse, representing Beske through the ACLU, expressed concern over the legal focus on bong water.

data.title: What's Going On With VinFast Auto Stock Wednesday?
data.description: VinFast Auto shares are relatively flat in premarket trading today. Yesterday, the company reported 21,912 EV deliveries for Q3, a significant increase from previous periods.

data.title: Starbucks Halloween-Themed 'Wicked' Drinks Hit Stores Alongside New Movie Merch Amid Weak Q4 Prelim Results
data.description: These themed drinks were made available from Oct. 22 in the U.S., Canada, and select international locations.
